Author:     Matteo Riondato <matteo@FreeBSD.org>

    pfctl: fix recursive printing of rules

    When asked to print rules recursively, correctly recurse for anchors
    included in pf.conf with "anchorname/*".

    PR:             262590
    Reviewed by:    kp
    MFC after:      3 weeks
